# Music Place

> Professional music equipment store. Instruments, recording gear, DJ equipment, and accessories. Serving musicians since 1993.

## About

Music Place is an e-commerce store specializing in professional music instruments and audio equipment. We offer guitars, drums, keyboards, recording equipment, DJ gear, headphones, microphones, and turntables. Free shipping on orders over $100. 30-day return policy.

## Products

We sell musical instruments and audio equipment across 17 categories:
- Accessories, Audio Interfaces, Audio Workstations, Bags & Cases
- Band & Orchestra, Controllers, DJ & Karaoke, Headphones
- Instruments, MIDI Controllers, MIDI Interfaces, Mixers
- Mouthpieces, Orchestral Strings, Recording, Software, Turntables

Each product includes: name, price, SKU, categories, tags, description, stock status, and rating.

## Pages

- [Home](/) — Homepage with featured products, categories, and promotions
- [Shop](/shop) — Full product catalog with search, filtering, and sorting
- [Sale](/sale) — Sale items with discounted prices
- [Blog](/blog) — Articles about music equipment and instruments
- [About Us](/about) — Company history and team
- [Contact](/contact) — Contact form, address, phone, email
- [Gallery](/gallery) — Photo gallery
- [Services](/services) — Music lessons, repairs, studio rental
- [Staff](/staff) — Meet our team
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy) — Data privacy information
- [Service Plus](/service-plus) — Website setup packages
- [Cart](/cart) — Shopping cart
- [Checkout](/checkout) — Secure checkout with billing and shipping

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/search?q=&minPrice=&maxPrice=&category=&sort=` — Search and filter products
- `GET /api/products` — List all products
- `GET /api/orders` — List orders (admin)
- `POST /api/orders` — Create order
- `GET /api/customers` — List customers (admin)
- `POST /api/customers` — Create/update customer

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 16, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Next.js API Routes
- Database: Neon PostgreSQL (orders, customers)
- Content: JSON files in data folder (products, blog, page content)
- Auth: Clerk
- ORM: Prisma

- Email: info@swiftideas.net

## Policies

- Free shipping on orders over $100
- 30-day return policy
- Secure payment processing
- Privacy policy available at /privacy-policy
